habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Breath Weapon (Su) Each type of mephit can unleash a particular breath weapon every 4 rounds as a standard action. The DC is Constitution-based and includes a +1 racial bonus. The breath weapon of a water mephit is a cone of acid that deals 1d8 acid damage.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Breath Weapon (Su) Each type of mephit can unleash a particular breath weapon every 4 rounds as a standard action. The DC is Constitution-based and includes a +1 racial bonus. The breath weapon of a water mephit is a cone of acid that deals 1d8 acid damage.

fullStatBlock:
CR 3
Water Mephit
N Small outsider water
Init +6
Senses darkvision 60 ft.; Perception +6
AC 17, touch 14, flat-footed 14 (+2 Dex, +1 dodge, +3 natural, +1 size)
hp 19 ((3d10+3))
Fort +2, Ref +5, Will +3
Speed 30 ft., swim 30 ft.
Melee 2 claws +5 (1d3+1 slashing)
Special Attacks breath weapon (15-foot cone, effect based on type, Reflex DC 13 for half)
Special Abilities Breath Weapon (Su) Each type of mephit can unleash a particular breath weapon every 4 rounds as a standard action. The DC is Constitution-based and includes a +1 racial bonus. The breath weapon of a water mephit is a cone of acid that deals 1d8 acid damage.
Spell-Like Abilities none
Statistics Str 13, Dex 15, Con 12, Int 6, Wis 11, Cha 14
Base Atk +3; CMB +3; CMD 15
Feats Dodge, Improved Initiative
Skills Bluff +8, Fly +10, Perception +6, Stealth +12
Languages Common, one appropriate elemental language (Aquan, Auran, Ignan, or Terran)
Environment  any (elemental planes)
Organization solitary, pair, gang (3-6), mob (7-12)
Treasure standard
DR 5/magic
Source PFRPG Bestiary
